understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` on each level within the turn limit. Each level gives 2 attempts of 50 turns each; avoid spikes or running out of turns.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Player moves with directional actions (MOVE_LEFT, MOVE_RIGHT, MOVE_UP, MOVE_DOWN, etc.). Gravity affects movement direction or fall behavior. Each move decrements the step counter. Landing on spike tiles ends the run. No clicks or undo mentioned—actions are purely movement based.
